autoscaling_config.description: Configuration defining the autoscaling behavior for the Spanner instance

default_backup_schedule_type.description: Specifies the default schedule type for backups on this Spanner instance

edition.description: Indicates the edition of the Spanner instance, such as 'Standard' or 'Enterprise'

effective_labels.description: Final set of labels applied to the Spanner instance after merging Terraform and user inputs

force_destroy.description: Flag to indicate whether the Spanner instance can be forcefully deleted

id.description: Unique identifier for the Spanner instance used across configurations

labels.description: Custom labels provided by the user for organizing the Spanner instance

num_nodes.description: Number of compute nodes allocated to the Spanner instance for performance scaling

processing_units.description: Total processing units allocated for the Spanner instance's computational needs

state.description: Current operational state of the Spanner instance, e.g., 'READY' or 'CREATING'

terraform_labels.description: Labels generated by Terraform for managing and identifying resources
